## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test update

## Verification

- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Relevant docs updated

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
